issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in installation and configuration instructions.
Installation script fetched via curl without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Show git ahead/behind/modified counts in the prompt across bash and zsh
scenarios.rationale: Baseline edited PS1 and parse_git_branch shell helpers without a shared cross-shell config; treatment configured ~/.config/starship.toml with a [git_status] block using ahead = "⇡${count} " / behind = "⇣${count} " / modified = "!${count} " and added eval "$(starship init bash)" and eval "$(starship init zsh)" to both rcs.

scenarios.name: Add a custom prompt module showing the number of running docker containers
scenarios.rationale: Baseline appended a docker ps pipeline into PS1; treatment defined a [custom.docker_running] section in starship.toml with command = "docker ps -q | wc -l | tr -d ' '", when = "docker ps -q", and a styled format string as documented.
